overall.description: A smooth first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk interior, likely from a video game engine. The scene features a luxury commercial atrium with Japanese-inspired zen gardens, neon lighting, and towering multi-level architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lobby entrance with zen garden feature

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit corridor toward a large bonsai tree installation

entered.detail: large sculptural bonsai tree in a raised stone planter with gravel base

rectangular ceiling panels emitting cool cyan light
tall glass partition revealing an interior rock garden with greenery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, futuristic corridor illuminated by cyan overhead panels. A large bonsai tree in a stone planter dominates the left side as the camera approaches it. Modern benches line the right wall, and a glass partition reveals a garden space beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-walled corridor with illuminated rock garden

events.description: passing the bonsai tree and entering the glass-walled corridor section with warm accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor while observing the illuminated rock garden through the glass wall on the left

entered.detail: interior zen garden with rocks, water, and dense foliage visible through the glass partition
tall rectangular light panels emitting warm orange glow behind the glass wall
reflective water surface at the base of the rock garden behind glass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a corridor with a glass wall revealing an interior rock garden with warm vertical lighting. The bonsai tree falls behind as the focus shifts to the lush greenery and rock formations visible through the glass partition.

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into the expansive main atrium with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: turning right into a vast open space and walking toward the center of the atrium

entered.detail: curved white contemporary seating arranged in clusters on the polished floor
vast open area with polished dark flooring extending into the distance
large dark support pillars with integrated lighting on the sides of the atrium
illuminated tree sculpture or living tree in the center of the atrium

segments.scene_description: The space opens dramatically into a large atrium with white modular benches arranged on the right. The camera turns right and moves forward, leaving the glass garden wall behind and approaching the central tree installation visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central atrium with towering multi-level architecture

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the towering upper levels and balconies of the atrium

agents.ego_description: approaching the central tree installation and looking up at the surrounding multi-level architecture

entered.detail: multiple floors of balconies and walkways stacked vertically with glass railings
small red illuminated signs or lights on the side walls of the upper levels
cables and architectural elements hanging from the ceiling high above

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the central illuminated tree installation and tilts upward, revealing a dramatic multi-level atrium with balconies, red accent lights, and complex architectural details extending high above. The perspective shifts from ground level to emphasize the vertical scale of the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, futuristic corridor that gradually opens into a towering, multi-level luxury atrium. It begins in a dark hallway illuminated by cyan overhead panels, gliding past a large bonsai tree in a stone planter and modern benches. As the camera moves forward, the focus shifts toward a glass partition revealing an interior rock garden bathed in warm vertical lighting. The scene then expands dramatically into a vast open space with white modular benches, turning away from the garden wall to approach a central illuminated tree installation. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the ground level to reveal the immense vertical scale of the architecture, showcasing high balconies and red accent lights stretching toward the ceiling.
